sglang.title: [Whisper] Automatic language detection via structured generation
sglang.author: shenxiul
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When no language parameter is specified for Whisper transcription, the server silently defaults to English (<|en|>). This produces incorrect output for non-English audio. This PR adds automatic language detection using SGLang's native structured generation, with minimal overhead.

sglang.title: [HiCache] Add synchronization for context parallelism
sglang.author: vladnosiv
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
HiCache previously synchronized state only within tp_group, which is no longer sufficient after the CP split.
This could cause different CP ranks to make different decisions about prefetch completion/revoke, write-through ack handling, and host-cache updates.
This change passes attn_cp / attn_tp gro

sglang.title: [VLM] Fix Kimi-K2.5 CPU path: rename grid_thws -> image_grid_thw
sglang.author: klshuster
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
KimiGPUProcessorWrapper._cpu_call returns the HF Kimi processor output verbatim, which uses grid_thws (plural) as the grid key. _gpu_call was updated in #22858 to return the SGL-standard image_grid_thw key, and KimiK25ForConditionalGeneration.get_image_feature was updated to read item.ima

sglang.title: fix: resolve tensor file overwrite between target and draft models
sglang.author: yaya159456
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
In Eagle mode, tensor files generated by the target and draft models share the same output paths, leading to unintended overwriting.
This change separates the file outputs to prevent conflicts.
This change only affects file output paths and does not impact model computation or performance.
Fixes #21

vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix k_norm weight sharding in MiniMaxM2Attention when total_num_kv_heads < tp_size
vllm.author: wxsIcey
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
When the number of KV heads is less than the tensor parallel size, KV heads are replicated across ranks. In this case, MiniMaxText01RMSNormTP was incorrectly sharding k_norm weights by tp_world instead of total_num_kv_heads, causing a shape mismatch at runtime.

vllm.title: [Bugfix ] fix bailing_moe_linear
vllm.author: ghphotoframe
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose


fix decode idx err vllm v1 reorders batches as decode-first, but _decode_infer was ported from SGLang which uses prefill-first ordering. In mixed batches, this caused decode requests to read q/k/v from wrong positions and update wrong KV cache state slots, corrupting the recurrent state an

vllm.title: [Core] Fix redundant None append in StepPool.forward for chunked prefill
vllm.author: anthonsu
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR fixes a logic error in vllm/model_executor/layers/pooler.py (or the respective StepPool implementation file) where None is appended twice to the output list when handling unfinished chunks during chunked prefill.
This fix is critical for embedding models that utilize StepPool to process long
